diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
index 15a14be1..9820b7d7 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
@@ -1304,6 +1304,11 @@ codeunit 99000832 "Sales Line-Reserve"
         if (NewSalesLine.Type <> NewSalesLine.Type::Item) or (NewSalesLine.Quantity = 0) or (NewSalesLine.Reserve <> NewSalesLine.Reserve::Always) then
             exit(false);
 
+        // For invoice lines created from shipments, do not delete all reservation entries when quantity is adjusted
+        // This preserves item tracking information that was copied from the shipment line
+        if NewSalesLine."Shipment No." <> '' then
+            exit(false);
+
         Item.SetLoadFields("Costing Method");
         Item.Get(NewSalesLine."No.");

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al

+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Posting/JobPostLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -478,6 +478,10 @@ codeunit 1001 "Job Post-Line"
         if IsHandled then
             exit;
 
+        Item.Get(PurchaseLine."No.");
+        if Item.Type = Item.Type::"Non-Inventory" then
+            exit;
+
         Job.Get(PurchaseLine."Job No.");
         if Job.GetQuantityAvailable(PurchaseLine."No.", PurchaseLine."Location Code", PurchaseLine."Variant Code", 0, 2) <
            -PurchaseLine."Return Qty. to Ship (Base)"
